phrases.intent_en: Ask what San Salvario is known for
phrases.text_local: Scusi, per cosa è famoso il quartiere San Salvario?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, per KOH-zah eh fah-MOH-zoh eel kwahr-TYEH-reh san sal-VAH-ryoh?
phrases.cultural_note: San Salvario is Turin's most multicultural and youthful neighbourhood, known for its aperitivo bars, ethnic restaurants and independent music venues.

responses.english: For multicultural food, aperitivo and nightlife.
responses.phonetic: per eel CHEE-boh mool-tee-ET-nee-koh, lah-peh-ree-TEE-voh eh lah VEE-tah not-TOOR-nah.
responses.local: Per il cibo multietnico, l'aperitivo e la vita notturna.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat ethnic food in San Salvario
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si mangia cucina etnica qui?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see MAN-jah koo-CHEE-nah ET-nee-kah kwee?

responses.english: On Via Saluzzo and Via Madama Cristina, many choices.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-ah sah-LOOT-tsoh eh VEE-ah mah-DAH-mah krees-TEE-nah, MOL-teh SHEL-teh.
responses.local: In Via Saluzzo e Via Madama Cristina, molte scelte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which tram goes from San Salvario to the city centre
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale tram porta al centro da San Salvario?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh tram POR-tah al CHEN-troh dah san sal-VAH-ryoh?

responses.english: Tram nine, stop on Via Nizza.
responses.phonetic: eel tram NOH-veh, fer-MAH-tah een VEE-ah NEET-tsah.
responses.local: Il tram nove, fermata in Via Nizza.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how far the Valentino Park is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto è lontano il Parco del Valentino?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh eh lon-TAH-noh eel PAR-koh del vah-len-TEE-noh?

responses.english: Five minutes on foot toward the Po.
responses.phonetic: CHEEN-kweh mee-NOO-tee ah PYEH-dee VER-soh eel po.
responses.local: Cinque minuti a piedi verso il Po.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to have a late aperitivo
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si fa un aperitivo tardivo da queste parti?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see fah oon ah-peh-ree-TEE-voh tar-DEE-voh dah KWES-teh PAR-tee?

responses.english: On Via Belfiore and Via Madama Cristina, until late.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-ah bel-FYOH-reh eh VEE-ah mah-DAH-mah krees-TEE-nah, FEE-noh ah TAR-dee.
responses.local: In Via Belfiore e Via Madama Cristina, fino a tardi.
